title: selaginella arenaria
intro: Selaginella arenaria, also known as spiny spike moss, is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and providing anti-cancer properties. Selaginella arenaria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or extract, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
